zh.Buckhurst by Withyham, Sussex, England: 英國素可巴可爾斯特 白 維提哈姆
zh.lifeSummary: 當Ralph de Dene of Buckhurst於大約1088年出生在英國素可巴可爾斯特 白 維提哈姆時，他的父親Robert De Denne III39歲，母親Lady Beatrice Bassett24歲。他於大約1120年與Johanna Sybella de Gatton在英國肯特結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他去世於1165年在英國肯特金斯頓享年78歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Dene
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Dahn
meanings: habitational name from a place in the Palatinate called Dahn.
(Dähn): ethnic name for a Dane, from Old Norse Dan-.

variants.name: Dean
meanings: English: topographic name from Middle English dene ‘valley’ (Old English denu), or a habitational name from any of several places in various parts of England named Dean or Dene from this word.

English: nickname or occupational name for the servant of a dean or nickname for someone thought to resemble a dean. A dean was an ecclesiastical official, the head of a chapter of canons or a church official with jurisdiction over a sub-division of an archdeaconry. Though no doubt some deans had illegitimate children, they were officially celibate, and in the main the surname is probably a nickname in origin, similar to Bishop , Prior , Priest , and Monk . The Middle English word deen, dien, dein, is a borrowing of Old French d(e)ien, doien from Latin decanus (originally a leader of ten men, from decem ‘ten’), and thus is a cognate of Deacon .
English: from the Middle English personal name Deyne (or Dene) a rhyming pet form of Reynald (see Reginald ).

nameMeanings.name: Ralph
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

variants.name: Ralf
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

historicEvents.title: The Crusades
historicEvents.description: A series of religious wars between Christians and Muslims, known as the Crusades, occurred between 1096 and 1291, and played a large role in European Christian dominance in the Middle East.

historicEvents.title: The Battle of Tichebray
historicEvents.description: King Henry I defeated and captured his brother, Robert of Normandy, at the Battle of Tinchebray in 1106. Robert remained in captivity until his death in 1134.

en.lifeSummary: When Ralph de Dene of Buckhurst was born about 1088, in Buckhurst by Withyham, Sussex, England, his father, Robert De Denne III, was 39 and his mother, Lady Beatrice Bassett, was 24. He married Johanna Sybella de Gatton about 1120, in Kent, England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 5 daughters. He died in 1165, in Kingston, Kent, England, at the age of 78.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ralph de Dene of Buckhurst est né environ 1088, à Buckhurst by Withyham, Sussex, Angleterre, son père, Robert De Denne III, avait 39 ans et sa mère, Lady Beatrice Bassett, avait 24 ans. Il a épousé Johanna Sybella de Gatton environ 1120, à Kent, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 5 filles. Il est décédé en 1165, à Kingston, Kent, Angleterre, à l’âge de 78 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Ralph de Dene of Buckhurst um 1088 in Buckhurst by Withyham, Sussex, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Robert De Denne III 39 und seine Mutter Lady Beatrice Bassett 24. Er hat um 1120 in Kent, England Johanna Sybella de Gatton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Er starb 1165 im Alter von 78 Jahren in Kingston, Kent, England.

Lui sposato Johanna Sybella de Gatton circa 1120, nel Kent, England. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 5 figlie. Morì nel 1165, nel Kingston, Kent, England, all'età di 78 anni.

ko.Of, Buckhurst, Sussex, England: 영국 잉글랜드 수세스 벅후르스트 비 위스이함
ko.lifeSummary: Ralph de Dene of Buckhurst(이)가 대략 1088년 영국 수세스 벅후르스트 비 위스이함에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert De Denne III(은)는 39세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Beatrice Bassett(은)는 24세였다. 그는 대략 1120년 영국 켄트에서 Johanna Sybella de Gatton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1165년 영국 켄트 킨그스턴에서 78세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Ralph de Dene of Buckhurst nasceu aproximadamente 1088, em Buckhurst by Withyham, Sussex, Inglaterra, seu pai, Robert De Denne III, tinha 39 anos e sua mãe, Lady Beatrice Bassett, tinha 24 anos. Ele casou-se com Johanna Sybella de Gatton aproximadamente 1120, em Kent, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 5 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1165, em Kingston, Kent, Inglaterra, com 78 anos.

ru.Of, Buckhurst, Sussex, England: буккхурст би витихам, суссекс, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ralph de Dene of Buckhurst родился около 1088 г. в местности буккхурст би витихам, суссекс, Англия, его отцу по имени Robert De Denne III было 39 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Beatrice Bassett, 24. Он женился на женщине по имени Johanna Sybella de Gatton около 1120 г. в местности кэнт, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 5 дочерей. Он умер в 1165 г. в местности кингстон, кэнт, Англия в возрасте 78 лет.

Se casó con Johanna Sybella de Gatton aproximadamente 1120, en Kent, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió en 1165, en Kingston, Kent, Inglaterra, a la edad de 78 años.
